mapper.sql: id,code,display_name,description,model_type,tags,supports_streaming,supports_tools,supports_vision,supports_cache,context_length,max_output_length,CASE WHEN enabled THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status,created_at,updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM platform_model WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND (code ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR display_name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))AND enabled=#{enabled} ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_model WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND (code ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR display_name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))AND enabled=#{enabled}
SELECT FROM platform_model WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM platform_model WHERE code=#{code} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_model SET display_name=#{model.displayName},description=#{model.description},model_type=#{model.modelType},tags=#{model.tags},supports_streaming=#{model.supportsStreaming},supports_tools=#{model.supportsTools},supports_vision=#{model.supportsVision},supports_cache=#{model.supportsCache},context_length=#{model.contextLength},max_output_length=#{model.maxOutputLength},enabled=#{model.enabled},updated_by=#{model.updatedBy},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{model.id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE platform_model SET enabled=#{enabled},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE platform_model SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.sql: id,tenant_id,provider_channel_id,platform_model_id,upstream_model_id,display_name,source_type,CASE WHEN enabled THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status,last_synced_at,last_sync_summary,created_at,updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM provider_channel_model WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (upstream_model_id ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR display_name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))AND enabled=#{enabled} ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM provider_channel_model WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND (upstream_model_id ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') OR display_name ILIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))AND enabled=#{enabled}
SELECT FROM provider_channel_model WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM provider_channel_model WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND upstream_model_id=#{upstreamModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE provider_channel_model SET display_name=#{displayName},enabled=#{enabled},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel_model SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE provider_channel_model SET platform_model_id=#{platformModelId},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tenant_model tm INNER JOIN platform_model pm ON pm.id=tm.platform_model_id AND pm.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE tm.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY tm.created_at DESC,tm.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tenant_model WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM tenant_model tm INNER JOIN platform_model pm ON pm.id=tm.platform_model_id AND pm.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE tm.id=#{id} AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND platform_model_id=#{platformModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.sql: id,currency_code,input_price::text AS input_price,output_price::text AS output_price,cache_write_price::text AS cache_write_price,cache_read_price::text AS cache_read_price,effective_at,expires_at,created_at
mapper.select: SELECT ,'PLATFORM_DEFAULT' AS source_type FROM platform_model_price WHERE platform_model_id=#{platformModelId} AND expires_at IS NULL
SELECT ,'PLATFORM_DEFAULT' AS source_type FROM platform_model_price WHERE platform_model_id=#{platformModelId} ORDER BY effective_at DESC,id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_model_price SET expires_at=NOW() WHERE platform_model_id=#{platformModelId} AND expires_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ,'TENANT_CUSTOM' AS source_type FROM tenant_model_price WHERE tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} AND expires_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model_price SET expires_at=NOW() WHERE tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} AND expires_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT ,'TENANT_CUSTOM' AS source_type FROM tenant_model_price WHERE tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} ORDER BY effective_at DESC,id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model SET price_mode=#{mode},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{tenantModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM model_route mr INNER JOIN route_target rt ON rt.model_route_id=mr.id AND rt.deleted_at IS NULL AND rt.enabled=TRUE WHERE mr.tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} AND mr.deleted_at IS NULL AND mr.enabled=TRUE)

SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model tm INNER JOIN platform_model pm ON pm.id=tm.platform_model_id AND pm.deleted_at IS NULL AND pm.enabled=TRUE INNER JOIN tenant t ON t.id=tm.tenant_id AND t.deleted_at IS NULL AND t.enabled=TRUE AND (t.expire_at IS NULL OR t.expire_at>NOW()) WHERE tm.id=#{tenantModelId} AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM model_route mr INNER JOIN route_target rt ON rt.model_route_id=mr.id AND rt.deleted_at IS NULL AND rt.enabled=TRUE WHERE mr.tenant_model_id=tm.id AND mr.deleted_at IS NULL AND mr.enabled=TRUE) AND ((tm.price_mode='INHERIT_PLATFORM_DEFAULT' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM platform_model_price pp WHERE pp.platform_model_id=tm.platform_model_id AND pp.expires_at IS NULL)) OR (tm.price_mode='TENANT_CUSTOM' AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tenant_model_price tp WHERE tp.tenant_model_id=tm.id AND tp.expires_at IS NULL))))
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant_model SET publish_status=#{status},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{tenantModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id,tenant_model_id,inbound_protocol,CASE WHEN enabled THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status,remark FROM model_route WHERE tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY inbound_protocol
SELECT id,tenant_model_id,inbound_protocol,CASE WHEN enabled THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status,remark FROM model_route WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM model_route WHERE tenant_model_id=#{tenantModelId} AND inbound_protocol=#{protocol} AND deleted_at IS NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE model_route SET enabled=#{enabled},remark=#{remark},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE model_route SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT rt.id,rt.model_route_id,rt.provider_channel_id,rt.provider_channel_model_id,mr.inbound_protocol AS protocol,pc.name AS channel_name,rt.upstream_model_id_snapshot,CASE WHEN rt.enabled THEN 'ENABLED' ELSE 'DISABLED' END AS status,rt.priority,rt.weight,rt.remark FROM route_target rt INNER JOIN model_route mr ON mr.id=rt.model_route_id INNER JOIN provider_channel pc ON pc.id=rt.provider_channel_id WHERE rt.model_route_id=#{routeId} AND rt.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY rt.priority,rt.id

SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM model_route mr INNER JOIN tenant_model tm ON tm.id=mr.tenant_model_id AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL INNER JOIN provider_channel pc ON pc.id=#{channelId} AND pc.tenant_id=tm.tenant_id AND pc.deleted_at IS NULL AND pc.enabled=TRUE INNER JOIN provider_base_url pbu ON pbu.id=pc.provider_base_url_id AND pbu.deleted_at IS NULL AND pbu.enabled=TRUE INNER JOIN provider_channel_model pcm ON pcm.id=#{channelModelId} AND pcm.provider_channel_id=pc.id AND pcm.tenant_id=tm.tenant_id AND pcm.deleted_at IS NULL AND pcm.enabled=TRUE WHERE mr.id=#{routeId} AND mr.deleted_at IS NULL AND pbu.protocol=mr.inbound_protocol)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO route_target(model_route_id,provider_channel_id,provider_channel_model_id,upstream_model_id_snapshot,priority,weight,remark,created_by,updated_by) SELECT #{routeId},#{channelId},#{channelModelId},upstream_model_id,#{priority},#{weight},#{remark},#{userId},#{userId} FROM provider_channel_model WHERE id=#{channelModelId} AND provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE route_target SET priority=#{priority},weight=#{weight},enabled=#{enabled},remark=#{remark},updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE route_target SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_by=#{userId},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT pm.code,COALESCE(tm.display_name,pm.display_name) AS display_name,COALESCE(tm.description,pm.description) AS description,pm.supports_streaming,pm.supports_tools,pm.supports_vision,pm.supports_cache,COALESCE(tp.currency_code,pp.currency_code) AS currency_code,COALESCE(tp.input_price,pp.input_price)::text AS input_price,COALESCE(tp.output_price,pp.output_price)::text AS output_price,CASE WHEN pm.supports_cache THEN COALESCE(tp.cache_write_price,pp.cache_write_price)::text END AS cache_write_price,CASE WHEN pm.supports_cache THEN COALESCE(tp.cache_read_price,pp.cache_read_price)::text END AS cache_read_price FROM tenant_model tm INNER JOIN platform_model pm ON pm.id=tm.platform_model_id AND pm.enabled=TRUE AND pm.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN tenant_model_price tp ON tp.tenant_model_id=tm.id AND tp.expires_at IS NULL AND tm.price_mode='TENANT_CUSTOM' LEFT JOIN platform_model_price pp ON pp.platform_model_id=pm.id AND pp.expires_at IS NULL AND tm.price_mode='INHERIT_PLATFORM_DEFAULT' WHERE tm.tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND tm.publish_status='ENABLED' AND tm.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY pm.code

SELECT pc.tenant_id,pbu.protocol,pbu.normalized_base_url FROM provider_channel pc INNER JOIN provider_base_url pbu ON pbu.id=pc.provider_base_url_id WHERE pc.id=#{channelId} AND pc.deleted_at IS NULL AND pc.enabled=TRUE AND pbu.deleted_at IS NULL AND pbu.enabled=TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_channel_model(tenant_id,provider_channel_id,upstream_model_id,display_name,source_type,source_credential_id,last_synced_at,last_sync_summary,created_by,updated_by) VALUES(#{tenantId},#{channelId},#{upstreamModelId},#{upstreamModelId},'SYNCED',#{credentialId},NOW(),'同步成功',#{userId},#{userId}) ON CONFLICT(provider_channel_id,upstream_model_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO UPDATE SET display_name=EXCLUDED.display_name,last_synced_at=NOW(),last_sync_summary='同步成功',source_credential_id=EXCLUDED.source_credential_id,updated_by=EXCLUDED.updated_by,updated_at=NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT upstream_model_id FROM provider_channel_model WHERE provider_channel_id=#{channelId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND upstream_model_id IN #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO provider_channel_model(tenant_id,provider_channel_id,upstream_model_id,display_name,source_type,source_credential_id,last_synced_at,last_sync_summary,created_by,updated_by) VALUES (#{tenantId},#{channelId},#{id},#{id},'SYNCED',#{credentialId},NOW(),'同步成功',#{userId},#{userId}) ON CONFLICT(provider_channel_id,upstream_model_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL DO UPDATE SET last_synced_at=NOW(),last_sync_summary='同步成功',source_credential_id=EXCLUDED.source_credential_id,updated_by=EXCLUDED.updated_by,updated_at=NOW()
